'''dhawasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnogonid|pycnogonid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnogonid|pycnogonid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhawasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæwæshæth|dhæwæshæth]] || [[word:dhæwæshæj|dhæwæshæj]] || [[word:dhæwæshæsh|dhæwæshæsh]] || [[word:dhæwæshæ|dhæwæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhawawashath|dhawawashath]] || [[word:dhawawashaj|dhawawashaj]] || [[word:dhawawashash|dhawawashash]] || [[word:dhawawasha|dhawawasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhawashath|dhawashath]] || [[word:dhawashaj|dhawashaj]] || [[word:dhawashash|dhawashash]] || [[word:dhawasha|dhawasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhawafshath|dhawafshath]] || [[word:dhawafshaj|dhawafshaj]] || [[word:dhawafshash|dhawafshash]] || [[word:dhawafshaf|dhawafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhawashatha|dhawashatha]] || [[word:dhawashaja|dhawashaja]] || [[word:dhawashasha|dhawashasha]] || [[word:dhawashaka|dhawashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhawashath|dhawashath]] || [[word:dhawashaj|dhawashaj]] || [[word:dhawashash|dhawashash]] || [[word:dhawasha|dhawasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhawashathal|dhawashathal]] || [[word:dhawashajal|dhawashajal]] || [[word:dhawashashal|dhawashashal]] || [[word:dhawashakal|dhawashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhawashathatha|dhawashathatha]] || [[word:dhawashajaja|dhawashajaja]] || [[word:dhawashashasha|dhawashashasha]] || [[word:dhawashaka|dhawashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhawashathan|dhawashathan]] || [[word:dhawashajan|dhawashajan]] || [[word:dhawashashan|dhawashashan]] || [[word:dhawashakan|dhawashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhawashathaoro|dhawashathaoro]] || [[word:dhawashajaoro|dhawashajaoro]] || [[word:dhawashashaoro|dhawashashaoro]] || [[word:dhawashakaoro|dhawashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
